decomposeRationale: Approved design (rasen/office-hours/session-picker-batch-journey.md) defines 3 slices with an explicit dependency chain: picker redesign + queue journey (pure frontend) -> batch publish core (publisher multi-record plan/stage/submit + daemon batch routes, pure backend) -> batch exits UI (pure frontend consuming the new routes). Combined diff would span an IA rewrite + new publisher contracts + new daemon routes — too large to review as one.

userDecisions.scope: session picker redesign (elftia-style tree + card grid + multi-select) + queue journey + batch exits (2026-07-09)
userDecisions.batchSemantics: queue + batch exit: ②③ per-session (signing is per-session by design), ④ unified batch exits — exit-1 merges N records into one branch/PR, exit-2 batch-submits per-record with aggregate estimate (user choice, 2026-07-09)
userDecisions.process: rasen 流程: design doc -> propose -> implement -> review -> ship/archive (user choice, 2026-07-09)
userDecisions.designAuthority: rasen/office-hours/session-picker-batch-journey.md is AUTHORITATIVE for all three slices

notes: Strict serial chain. CLI is the rasen fork (node <rasen.js path>). Do NOT touch rasen/changes/codex-session-reader/ (someone else's in-flight change). Do NOT modify archived artifacts.
humanFollowUps: 切片1 accepted-known：M2 已签项切回无显式已签提示；M3 title-hover 与 BatchExitSummary 下载/409 分支缺断言（可随切片3补）；M4 N=1 touched 后 restart 弹确认（有意）；M5 过渡态 .jsonl 文件名（切片3替换）
GUI 冒烟测试仍未做（v03 遗留 + 本轮新选择页/队列旅程）
